---
title: "diabetes modelling china"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

## Importing data

```{r}
df <- read_excel("diabetes work china.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# OR from Chinese paper
OR <- 1.73
LCL <- 1.37
UCL <- 2.18

# log scaling OR
beta <- log(OR)
# log scaling the uncertainty
beta_se <- (log(UCL)-log(LCL)) /(2 *1.96)

# Assuming expousre follows lognormal distribution
z25 <- qnorm(0.25)
z75 <- qnorm(0.75)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(meanlog = log(p_50),
         sdlog = (log(p_75) - log(p_25)) / (z75 - z25))


# choosing reference/baseline exposure
df <- df %>%
  mutate(x_ref = p_25)

# PAF function
# continous exposure
paf_cont <- function(RR) {
  (mean(RR) - 1) / mean(RR)
} 
```

## Monte Carlo

```{r}
run_mc_row_china <- function(i_diabetes, meanlog, sdlog, x_ref,
                             beta, beta_se,
                             nsim = 10000,
                             baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {

  # Danish exposure distribution
  X <- rlnorm(nsim, meanlog = meanlog, sdlog = sdlog)

  # Avoiding values below reference, LOD as minimum-risk level
  X <- pmax(X, x_ref)

  # Uncertainty in dose-response coefficient
  beta_s <- rnorm(1, mean = beta, sd = beta_se)

  # Relative risk for each simulated exposure
  # take each simulated exposure X
  # compare it to the reference
  # use the Chinese slope to convert that exposure difference into an RR
  RR <- exp(beta_s * (log(X) - log(x_ref)))

  # Continuous PAF
  PAF <- paf_cont(RR)

  # Baseline cases
  base_cases <- if (baseline_uncertainty) {
    rpois(1, lambda = i_diabetes)
  } else {
    i_diabetes
  }

  AC <- PAF * base_cases

  tibble(
    PAF = PAF,
    AC  = AC
  )
}
```

```{r}
run_mc_summary_china <- function(i_diabetes, meanlog, sdlog, x_ref,
                                 beta, beta_se,
                                 nsim_outer = 5000,
                                 nsim_inner = 5000,
                                 baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {

  sims <- map_dfr(seq_len(nsim_outer), function(i) {
    run_mc_row_china(
      i_diabetes = i_diabetes,
      meanlog = meanlog,
      sdlog = sdlog,
      x_ref = x_ref,
      beta = beta,
      beta_se = beta_se,
      nsim = nsim_inner,
      baseline_uncertainty = baseline_uncertainty
    )
  })

  tibble(
    PAF_med = median(sims$PAF),
    PAF_lo  = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.025),
    PAF_hi  = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.975),
    AC_med  = median(sims$AC),
    AC_lo   = quantile(sims$AC, 0.025),
    AC_hi   = quantile(sims$AC, 0.975)
  )
}
```

```{r}
results_cases <- df %>%
  mutate(
    mc = pmap(
      list(i_diabetes, meanlog, sdlog, x_ref),
      ~ run_mc_summary_china(
        i_diabetes = ..1,
        meanlog = ..2,
        sdlog = ..3,
        x_ref = ..4,
        beta = beta,
        beta_se = beta_se,
        nsim_outer = 3000,
        nsim_inner = 3000,
        baseline_uncertainty = FALSE
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  unnest(mc)

results_cases
```

## 

```{r}
# implied RR at observed Danish percentiles, relative to x_ref
rr_from_x <- function(x, x_ref, beta) {
  exp(beta * (log(x) - log(x_ref)))
}

rr_check <- df %>%
  transmute(
    group,
    x_ref,
    RR_p25 = rr_from_x(p_25, x_ref, beta),
    RR_p50 = rr_from_x(p_50, x_ref, beta),
    RR_p75 = rr_from_x(p_75, x_ref, beta),
    RR_p90 = rr_from_x(p_90, x_ref, beta),
    RR_p95 = rr_from_x(p_95, x_ref, beta)
  )

rr_check
```
